code: @Manual{,   title = {gleifr: Client for the 'GLEIF' API},   author = {Maximilian Mücke},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.1},   url = {https://m-muecke.github.io/gleifr/}, }

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: gleifr minimal R client GLEIF API. major challenge dealing financial data mapping entities across different data sources. Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) 20-character, alphanumeric code uniquely identifies legally distinct entities engage financial transactions. Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation (GLEIF) maintains global LEI system exposes free, public API. gleifr wraps API can, R: look reference data behind LEI, search LEIs name, jurisdiction, full text, traverse corporate hierarchies via direct ultimate parent child relationships, map LEIs identifiers ISIN, BIC, MIC, access supporting reference data like regions accredited issuers (Local Operating Units).

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: can install development version gleifr GitHub :

what: Looking up a record by LEI
title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: Pass LEI lei_records() retrieve full reference data. default result returned tidy long-format data frame one attribute per row: Set simplify = FALSE get raw API response nested list instead.
code: records <- lei_records("001GPB6A9XPE8XJICC14") str(records) #> 'data.frame':    37 obs. of  3 variables: #>  $ lei  : chr  "001GPB6A9XPE8XJICC14" "001GPB6A9XPE8XJICC14" "001GPB6A9XPE8XJ".. #>  $ name : chr  "entity_legal_name_name" "entity_legal_name_language" "entity_".. #>  $ value: chr  "Fidelity Advisor Leveraged Company Stock Fund" "en" "FIDELITY"..

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: called without id, lei_records() searches LEI database. can filter legal name, jurisdiction, status, run full-text query: default matching pages fetched automatically. Use page_size page_number page results manually, ... pass additional GLEIF filter, e.g. "filter[entity.legalAddress.country]" = "DE".
code: # search by legal name lei_records(legal_name = "Deutsche Bank")  # combine filters lei_records(jurisdiction = "DE", status = "ACTIVE")

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: Traverse ownership hierarchies lei_parents() lei_children():
code: # direct parent (use type = "ultimate" for the ultimate parent) lei_parents("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")  # direct children lei_children("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: lei_mapping() downloads latest bulk relationship file maps every LEI another identifier type: ISIN, BIC, MIC, OpenCorporates ID ("oc"): fetch ISINs single entity instead full file, use lei_isins():
code: mapping <- lei_mapping("isin") head(mapping) #>                    lei         isin #> 1 00EHHQ2ZHDCFXJCPCL46 US92204Q1031 #> 2 00KLB2PFTM3060S2N216 US4138382027 #> 3 029200038B4L4ZI1E579 NGSDCBANCO00 #> 4 029200067A7K6CH0H586 NGSDCSCSPLC2 #> 5 0292001178F3RHI5D836 NGNEIMETH001 #> 6 0292001868F6N5VI5G15 NGGUARANTY06 lei_isins("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: lei_regions() lei_issuers() return supporting reference data, latter listing accredited Local Operating Units (LOUs) issue LEIs:

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: API responses can cached locally avoid repeated downloads. Caching opt-controlled options:
code: # enable caching (responses are kept for 1 day by default) options(gleifr.cache = TRUE)  # customize the maximum age in seconds options(gleifr.cache_max_age = 3600)  # inspect or clear the cache gleifr_cache_dir() gleifr_cache_clear()

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: gleifr - R package support analysis GLEIF data

what: Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
title: Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
text: gleifr_cache_dir() returns path cached API responses stored. gleifr_cache_clear() clears cached responses.

title: Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
text: cache used enabled options(gleifr.cache = TRUE). Cached responses stored 1 day default, can customized options(gleifr.cache_max_age = seconds).

title: Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # enable caching options(gleifr.cache = TRUE)  # view cache location gleifr_cache_dir()  # clear the cache gleifr_cache_clear() } # }

what: gleifr: Client for the 'GLEIF' API — gleifr-package
title: gleifr: Client for the 'GLEIF' API — gleifr-package
text: Download legal entity reference data 'Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation' ('GLEIF') API. Retrieve Legal Entity Identifier ('LEI') records, direct ultimate parent child relationships, accredited issuers ('Local Operating Units'), mappings 'LEI' codes identifiers 'ISIN', 'BIC', 'MIC'. See https://www.gleif.org/en/lei-data/gleif-api details.

title: gleifr: Client for the 'GLEIF' API — gleifr-package
text: Maintainer: Maximilian Mücke muecke.maximilian@gmail.com (ORCID) Authors: Maximilian Mücke muecke.maximilian@gmail.com (ORCID)

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
text: Fetches direct child records given LEI.

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
text: id (character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch children . simplify (logical(1)) output simplified? Default TRUE.

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
text: simplify = TRUE, long-format data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier name: attribute name value: attribute value simplify = FALSE, named list() containing raw API response.

title: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
text: id (character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch ISINs .

text: data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier isin: ISIN

title: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins

title: Fetch LEI issuers — lei_issuers
text: data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier issuer name: issuer name marketing_name: marketing name website: issuer website accreditation_date: accreditation date

Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
text: https://www.gleif.org/en/lei-data/lei-mapping

title: Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
text: type (character(1)) type mapping data download. One "isin", "bic", "mic", "oc". Default "isin".

title: Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
text: data.frame() lei corresponding mapping.

title: Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
Fetch LEI parent records — lei_parents
text: Fetches direct ultimate parent record given LEI.

title: Fetch LEI parent records — lei_parents
text: id (character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch parent . type (character(1)) type parent fetch. One "direct" "ultimate". Default "direct". simplify (logical(1)) output simplified? Default TRUE.

title: Fetch LEI parent records — lei_parents
text: simplify = TRUE, long-format data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier name: attribute name value: attribute value simplify = FALSE, named list() containing raw API response.

title: Fetch LEI parent records — lei_parents
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # get direct parent lei_parents("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")  # get ultimate parent lei_parents("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336", type = "ultimate") } # }

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
text: Fetch LEI records

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
code: lei_records(   id = NULL,   legal_name = NULL,   jurisdiction = NULL,   status = NULL,   fulltext = NULL,   ...,   page_size = 200L,   page_number = NULL,   simplify = TRUE )

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
text: id (NULL | character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch. legal_name (NULL | character(1)) Filter legal name. relevant id NULL. jurisdiction (NULL | character(1)) Filter jurisdiction. relevant id NULL. status (NULL | character(1)) Filter entity status. relevant id NULL. fulltext (NULL | character(1)) Full-text search query. relevant id NULL. ... Additional filter parameters passed GLEIF API. appended query parameters, e.g. "filter[entity.legalAddress.country]" = "DE". page_size (NULL | integer(1)) number records per page. relevant id NULL. Default 200L. page_number (NULL | integer(1)) page number fetch. relevant id NULL. NULL (default), pages fetched automatically. simplify (logical(1)) output simplified? Default TRUE.

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
text: simplify = TRUE, long-format data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier name: attribute name value: attribute value simplify = FALSE, named list() containing raw API response.

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # get simplified long-format data.frame lei_records("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")  # get raw API response as named list lei_records("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336", simplify = FALSE)  # search by legal name lei_records(legal_name = "Deutsche Bank") } # }

title: Fetch LEI regions — lei_regions
text: Fetches list regions GLEIF API.

title: Fetch LEI regions — lei_regions
text: data.frame() columns: code: region code language: language region name name: region name
